items.title: QUIC & Modern Transport Protocols
items.description: QUIC protocol internals, HTTP/3, connection migration, 0-RTT, multiplexing without HOL blocking, and comparison with TCP+TLS.

items.title: TCP, UDP & Transport Layer
items.description: TCP's three-way handshake, flow control, congestion control, connection termination, and UDP — when to use each and how they work.
